channel.title: Welcome to the Official SPCC Computer Club Website on SPCC Computer Club
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to the Official SPCC Computer Club Website on SPCC Computer Club

item.title: Quadratic Equation Problems
item.description: If $a, b$ are the real roots of the equation $x^2 + ax + b = 0$, where $a \neq b$, find the values of $a$ and $b$. We have $a + b = -a$ and $ab = b$. Then $a = 1$ and $b = -2$. If the quadratic equations $x^2 + bx + 1 = 0$ and $x^2 - x - b = 0$, find the value of $b$.

item.title: Differentiation of Trigonometric Functions
item.description: Differentiation of Trigonometric Function # Limit of $\frac{\sin x}{x}$ and $\frac{1 - \cos x}{x}$ as $x \to 0$ # The proofs of $\lim_{x \to 0} \frac{\sin x}{x} = 1$ is obvious by squeeze theorem. Derivatives of $\sin x$ and $\cos x$ # $$ \frac{d}{d x}(\sin x) = \cos x $$

item.title: F3 CL Python Assignment 1: Introduction to Python
item.description: What is Python? Why Python? # Powerful # Python is a powerful scripting langugae. You can use it to create games, web scrapers and automate works. You can use it to build softwares and web applications. You can use it for scientific computation and data analysis. You can use it for machine learning and deep learning.

item.title: Production
item.description: Production Function # Production is the process of turning inputs (factors of production, resources) into outputs (products, returns). We can define the production function: $$ Q = P(x_1, \dots, x_n) $$ where $x_i$ are the inputs, $P$ is the production function and $Q$ is the outputs. Production Period # The employment of variable factors increases but that of fixed factors remains unchanged as the output increases.

item.title: Determining the Degrees of Separation Apart two Actors
item.description: CS50’s Original Page Source Code Problem Statement # Determine the degrees of separation apart two actors, for example: Loading data... Data loaded. Name: Morgan Freeman Name: Denzel Washington 1 degrees of separation. 1: Morgan Freeman and Denzel Washington starred in Glory Loading data... Data loaded. Name: Elvis Presley Name: Kevin Bacon Which 'Kevin Bacon'?

item.title: Even and Odd Functions
item.description: Definition of Even and Odd Functions # A function $f$ is even if: $$ f(x) = f(-x) $$ and is odd if: $$ -f(x) = f(-x) $$ Properties of Even and Odd Functions # $\pm$ Odd Even Odd Odd N/A Even N/A Even $\times$ Odd Even Odd Even Odd Even Odd Even Even Function Odd Derivative; Vice Versa # If a differentiable function $f$ is even, then $\frac{df}{dx}$ is odd; if $f$ is odd, then $\frac{df}{dx}$ is even.

item.title: Hyperbolic Functions
item.description: Definition of Hyperbolic Functions # basic_hyperbolic Let $f$ be a function. Assume that suppose whenever $f(x)$ is defined implies $f(-x)$ defined, then: $$ f(x) = \frac{1}{2}(f(x) + f(-x)) + \frac{1}{2}(f(x) - f(-x)) $$ where $\frac{1}{2}(f(x) + f(-x))$ is an even function, and $\frac{1}{2}(f(x) - f(-x))$ is an odd function. The function $e^x$ is defined for all $x \in \R$, then:

item.title: Analytic Rectangular Geometry
item.description: Rectangle Object # A rectangle can be defined by two points: $(x_1, y_1)$ the bottom-left point and $(x_2, y_2)$ the top right point, where $x_2 \geq x_1$ and $y_2 \geq y_1$. The area of it is given by $(x_2 - x_1) \cdot (y_2 - y_1)$. class rectangle: def __init__(self): self.x_1, self.

item.title: Serge Lang Algebra: Groups: Monoid
item.description: Definition of Monoid 1.1 # Law of Composition 1.1.1 # Let $S$ be a set. A mapping $S \times S \to S$ is a law of composition. If $x, y \in S$, the image of the pair $(x, y)$ is a product denoted $xy$. Equipment of Monoid 1.1.2 # Let $G$ be a monoid.
